bird.name: Regal sunbird
bird.summary: The regal sunbird (Cinnyris regius) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests.

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
locations.summary: The Albertine Rift montane forests (French: Forêts montagnardes du Rift Albertin) is a tropical moist broadleaf forest…

relations.subject: Regal sunbird
relations.evidence: It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests

relations.subject: Regal sunbird
relations.evidence: The regal sunbird's range spans the entire Albertine Rift montane forests (from Uganda to Tanzania), where it occurs between above sea level. Its habitat includes evergreen mountain forest, mixed forest, secondary growth forest, scrubland and bamboo
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
